title: Agent Operations Lead
company_context: AI governance platform — 'air traffic control for your company's AI agents' (observability, compliance, risk intelligence for agentic AI). Founded early 2025. Offices London + NY, 37 staff scaling to ~50.
momentum_flag: HOT — $30M Series A closed 2026-05-28 (Fortune-covered), headcount 37→50 next quarter
biggest_lever: Role is literally 'build agentic workflows with Claude Code/Cowork, n8n, Zapier, LangGraph, MCPs' to expand operational capacity without headcount — a 1:1 match for Ryan's 'building AI agents with Claude Code to create leverage for startup teams' positioning, plus his first-employee systems-from-scratch background.
biggest_risk: Title says 'Lead' and the JD expects deep hands-on familiarity with multi-agent architectures/orchestration patterns — Ryan's agent-building is self-taught (Claude Code competitor-intel/growth agents), so he must evidence concrete agentic systems he has shipped, not just usage.
apply_move: Apply via Ashby. Lead with a short Loom or write-up of an actual Claude-Code/MCP agent workflow he built (competitor-intel pipeline) framed as 'operational leverage', and tie his Minima 1→30 first-employee record to 'building systems without technical debt'.
why_fits_operator_intent: Genuine agent-native operator role — design/build internal agentic systems and enable teams to use agents; pure operator+AI-builder leverage, not sales/CS.
